overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City at night. The journey begins in a dark narrow alley, exits into a neon-lit urban plaza with towering futuristic buildings, continues along city streets and underpasses, and ends in a busy covered commercial walkway. The scene is dominated by vibrant neon signage, holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk architecture.

events.description: approaching exit, bright light from outside becomes visible at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark narrow corridor toward the lit exit

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with pipes and industrial fixtures lining the narrow passage
scattered trash, cardboard, and discarded items covering the concrete floor
bright illumination from the corridor exit showing the outside urban environment
wall with green and blue graffiti tags and markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow service corridor with debris scattered across the concrete floor. The player walks forward toward a brightly lit exit at the far end, with graffiti-covered walls visible on the right side. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit until the final moments when natural night lighting from outside becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with towering buildings

events.description: exits dark corridor into open urban plaza with tall neon-lit buildings
ambient light shifts from dark artificial to bright neon and holographic illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the towering neon buildings and advertisements

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents
large digital billboard displaying a political campaign poster with neon red text
tropical plants in planters decorating the urban plaza
multi-level building complex with holographic displays and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture. Bright neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the night, including a prominent political poster. Palm trees and paved walkways suggest a commercial district, while a construction worker passes by in the distance.

events.description: turns right corner along the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the building perimeter, passing benches with seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on circular bench reading a device

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete facade with horizontal panel lines
large rectangular red louvered vents on the building exterior
yellow and white modern benches with people sitting and resting
metal escalator leading to upper level with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the perimeter of a large concrete building featuring distinctive red ventilation grilles. The path passes modern benches where pedestrians sit and rest. An escalator structure is visible in the distance as the player rounds the corner, moving away from the open plaza into a more confined walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection leading to covered underpass

events.description: turns corner and approaches street crossing with neon-lit shops
vehicle passes by while crossing the street entering the underpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering a covered underpass area with moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the underpass with headlights on

entered.detail: storefront with bright purple neon lighting and vertical sign
large covered walkway entrance with blue structural elements
large support columns for the overhead structure
futuristic sedan driving through the covered roadway

segments.scene_description: The player turns a corner and approaches a street crossing with a prominent purple neon shopfront. After crossing, they enter a covered underpass where a futuristic vehicle drives past. The environment transitions from open sky to a partially covered area with concrete pillars and blue structural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy covered commercial walkway with shops

events.description: crowd density increases significantly in the commercial underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded covered walkway lined with shops and advertisements

notable_agents.action: crowd of people walking in both directions through the covered passage

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with linear fluorescent lighting panels
store entrances with illuminated signs and merchandise displays
vertical screens displaying animated advertisements and product promotions
dense gathering of people walking through the commercial passage

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a busy covered commercial walkway filled with pedestrians. The ceiling features linear lighting panels while digital advertising screens and shopfronts line the walls. The crowd density increases significantly as the player navigates through this bustling pedestrian thoroughfare with neon signs visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic service corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins in a dark, narrow alleyway with debris-strewn concrete and graffiti-covered walls, moving steadily toward a bright light at the far end. As the player emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast commercial district dominated by towering cyberpunk architecture, holographic billboards, and vibrant neon signage. The camera then shifts away from the open plaza, gliding along the perimeter of a concrete building with red ventilation grilles and passing resting pedestrians. Finally, the path rounds a corner toward a distant escalator, transitioning from the wide-open square into a more confined city walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open urban street crossing into a densely populated, enclosed commercial thoroughfare. It begins as the camera turns a corner toward a street crossing dominated by a prominent purple neon shopfront. As the player crosses the street, the environment shifts from the open night sky into a partially covered underpass characterized by concrete pillars, blue structural lighting, and a passing futuristic vehicle. The scene then expands into a bustling covered walkway where linear ceiling panels replace the open air and digital advertising screens line the walls. Finally, the camera navigates through an increasing crowd of pedestrians, moving deeper into the neon-lit commercial hub.
